title: Server Ping
description: Spoof the player list and count of your server
body:
# Server Ping
Server Ping is a server-side mod that allows spoofing the player list and count displayed on the server screen.

## Features
1. Spoof the player list that is displayed
2. Spoof the current and maximum player count

For more information visit the [Github page](https://github.com/redstonekasi/serverping).
